extract: Cyclizar (Japanese: モトトカゲ Mototokage) is a dual-type Dragon/Normal Pokémon introduced in Generation IX. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, the Paradox Pokémon Koraidon and Miraidon are said to be either ancient and future relatives of Cyclizar, respectively, or versions of it from parallel timelines.
